ai-careers-usa.title: How to Start a Career in AI in the United States (Even Without a Tech Degree)
ai-careers-usa.excerpt: Learn how to break into AI careers in the United States.
ai-careers-usa.content:
Artificial Intelligence is no longer the future — it is the present. From healthcare to finance, marketing to logistics, AI is transforming businesses across the United States. You do not necessarily need a computer science degree to start an AI career.

## Why AI Careers Are Growing
AI professionals earn competitive salaries and remote opportunities are expanding.

## Core Skills to Learn
- Python programming
- Machine learning basics
- Data analysis
- APIs and automation

## Final Thoughts
Focus on building practical projects and a strong portfolio.
